title: Special message to Kyle Pounds fans. VERY VERY VERY VERY IMPORTANT!!!!!!

transcript.text: Hello, really quickly, this is a special message to my YouTube fans, Kyle Pounds fans.
This is a special message, um, I got an email the other day that, uh, some dude, I can't
Remember who it was, I think it was TempleDog69, but I'm not so sure.
So basically this message is half, specifically for TempleDog69, and I guess half for all
The other fans of Kyle Pounds.
Um, he reminded me of something, and it was a brilliant thing that he reminded me of.
Um, I'm living in a house right now, is what he reminded me of.
And you know what houses have?
Power you can get out of an electrical outlet.
So, uh, straight up, uh, send me a 300 gigabyte hard drive, and, uh, if, you know, um, send
Me a PM, I send you my address, and, uh, you know what kind of magic, you know what kind
Of magic will ensue after that, so, peace out.

And, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh, uh
